articleList.title: Fnords
articleList.selectFeed: Select a feed from the sidebar

articleView.selectArticle: Select an article from the list
articleView.noContent: No content available. Click "Open in browser" to read the full article.
articleView.analyzeRequiresFulltext: Full text required for AI analysis
articleView.analyzeNoModel: No AI model selected - configure in Settings
articleView.statisticalNote: This preview shows the statistical analysis before LLM validation.

keywordTooltips.openNetwork: Open in the Immanentize network (trends and relations).
keywordTooltips.qualityNote: Score based on usage and network links.
keywordTooltips.showNeighbors: Show similar keywords from the network.

settings.title: Settings
settings.enableHeadlessBrowserDescription: Uses a headless browser for pages with JavaScript-generated content. Requires more resources but improves full-text extraction for modern websites.

sync.title: Synchronization
sync.onStartDescription: Automatically update feeds when the app starts

settings.themeModeDescription: Choose whether fuckupRSS uses a light, dark, or system theme
settings.darkThemeDescription: Used in dark mode or when system mode with dark OS
settings.lightThemeDescription: Used in light mode or when system mode with light OS
settings.logLevelDescription: Only visible in development mode. Controls the detail level of logs.

ollama.title: AI Settings
ollama.providerDescription: Ollama processes locally, OpenAI-compatible uses an external API (OpenAI, Together.ai, Mistral, Groq etc.)
ollama.ollamaUrlDescription: URL of the Ollama server. For local use: http://localhost:11434
ollama.apiBaseUrlDescription: Base URL of the API provider (e.g. https://api.openai.com)
ollama.apiKeyDescription: The API key is stored locally in the database
ollama.openaiModelDescription: Model name for text analysis (e.g. gpt-5-nano, gpt-5-mini)
ollama.openaiTemperatureDescription: Controls the creativity of AI responses. 'Auto' uses the API default and is compatible with all models.
ollama.openaiConcurrencyDescription: Number of parallel API requests. Higher values speed up batch processing but may trigger rate limits.
ollama.embeddingNote: Embeddings generate semantic vectors for similarity search and keyword detection.
ollama.openaiEmbeddingNote: OpenAI embeddings are truncated to 1024 dimensions to remain compatible with the existing database.
ollama.embeddingProviderWarning: When switching the embedding provider, all embeddings must be regenerated (Maintenance → Generate Embeddings).
ollama.costLimitDescription: Maximum monthly cost for API calls
ollama.unavailableDescription: AI features are disabled. Install Ollama from ollama.com
ollama.contextLengthDescription: Higher values allow longer articles but require more VRAM. 4K is sufficient for most articles.
ollama.ollamaConcurrencyDescription: Number of parallel requests to Ollama. Keep at 1 for local Ollama. Increase for remote Ollama with OLLAMA_NUM_PARALLEL > 1.
ollama.loadModelsDescription: Loads the selected models into graphics memory. The selection is saved automatically.
ollama.modelMissingHint: This model must be downloaded before AI analysis will work.

proxy.title: LAN Proxy (macOS Tahoe Workaround)
proxy.description: Routes Ollama requests through a local proxy because macOS Tahoe blocks direct LAN access for unsigned apps.

ai.title: AI Settings
ai.fastDescription: Fast analysis for summaries, categorization and keywords
ai.reasoningDescription: Deep analysis for briefings and complex tasks
ai.embeddingDescription: Semantic vectors for similarity search and clustering
ai.contextLengthDescription: Higher values allow longer articles but require more VRAM
ai.embeddingWarning: When switching the embedding provider, all embeddings must be regenerated

prompts.title: AI Prompts
prompts.discordianPromptDescription: Combined analysis with statistical context (Summary + Bias + Keywords + Categories). Uses placeholders: {language}, {title}, {content}, {stat_keywords}, {stat_categories}

opml.title: OPML Import/Export
opml.description: Import or export your feeds in OPML format
opml.exportDescription: Export all your feeds as an OPML file

maintenance.title: Maintenance
maintenance.calculateScoresDesc: Calculate quality scores for all keywords based on usage and connections
maintenance.generateEmbeddingsDesc: Generate semantic vectors for similarity detection (requires Ollama)
maintenance.findSynonymsDesc: Find semantically similar keywords based on embeddings
maintenance.pruneLowQualityDesc: Remove keywords with low scores (older than 7 days)
maintenance.statisticalAnalysisDesc: Extract keywords and categories using TF-IDF for unprocessed articles
maintenance.resetForReprocessingDesc: Reset all articles for re-analysis by AI (Discordian Analysis)
maintenance.confirmPrune: Really remove all keywords with low scores?
maintenance.confirmReset: Really reset all articles for re-analysis? This may take a while.
maintenance.ollamaUnavailable: Ollama not available - cannot start analysis
maintenance.noKeywordsToUpdate: All quality scores are up to date
maintenance.noPruneCandidates: No candidates found (score < 0.2, older than 7 days, max. 1 article)
maintenance.updateKeywordTypesDesc: Detects and updates the types of all keywords (Person, Organization, Location, Acronym, Concept)
maintenance.updateKeywordTypesDescSemantic: Uses heuristics + semantic embedding analysis for better type detection (Law of Fives)
maintenance.keywordTypesUpdated: {total} keywords updated: {concept} concepts, {person} persons, {organization} organizations, {location} locations, {acronym} acronyms
maintenance.keywordTypesUpdatedSemantic: {total} keywords updated: {concept} concepts, {person} persons, {organization} organizations, {location} locations, {acronym} acronyms ({lowConfidence} low confidence)

shortContent.title: Short Articles
shortContent.analyzeDesc: Find articles with insufficient full-text content
shortContent.refetchDesc: Try to refetch articles with short content
shortContent.deleteNullDesc: Deletes all articles without full-text content (NULL or empty)
shortContent.deleteNullConfirm: Really delete {count} articles without content? This action cannot be undone.
shortContent.excludeFromAiDesc: Marks very short articles as processed so they won't be analyzed
shortContent.refetchFeed: Refetch short articles for this feed
shortContent.helpTitle: What to do if refetch doesn't help?
shortContent.helpText1: Some websites block automated access or generate content dynamically.
shortContent.helpText2: Enable JavaScript rendering in settings for better results.
shortContent.helpText3: You can delete empty articles or exclude them from AI analysis.

maintenance.fixCategoriesDesc: Derives categories from keyword network (weighted by specificity and frequency)
maintenance.extractEntitiesDesc: Extracts persons, organizations, locations and events from articles without NER data (requires AI provider)
maintenance.splitCompoundsDesc: Splits keywords like 'Ukraine-War' into separate keywords 'Ukraine' and 'War'. German states, sports terms, and proper nouns are preserved.
maintenance.confirmSplitCompounds: Really split {count} compound keywords? The originals will be deleted.

orphanedArticles.title: Orphaned Articles
orphanedArticles.description: Finds and deletes articles whose source no longer exists.
orphanedArticles.foundWithFavorites: {count} orphaned articles found, {favorites} of which are favorites.
orphanedArticles.confirmDeleteAll: Really delete all {count} orphaned articles, including {favorites} favorites?

stopwords.title: Stopwords
stopwords.description: Manage words that should be ignored during keyword extraction
stopwords.minLength: Stopword must be at least 2 characters
stopwords.alreadyExists: This word is already a stopword

fnord.description: A changed article. In the Illuminatus! trilogy, fnords are hidden words that only the initiated can see.

concealed.description: An unread article. Hidden until enlightened by reading.

illuminated.description: A read article. Being 'illuminated' means knowing the truth.

golden_apple.description: A favorited article. The golden apple is the symbol of Discordia.

pentacle.description: A feed source. The pentacle is a five-pointed star - symbol of mystical power.

sephiroth.description: A category. The Sephiroth are the ten attributes of the kabbalistic Tree of Life.

immanentize.description: A keyword/tag. 'Immanentizing the Eschaton' means bringing about the end times.

greyface.description: Bias warning. Greyface is the mythical origin of all seriousness and order.

discordian.description: AI summary. Discordianism is the 'religion' of the goddess Eris/Discordia.

hagbard.description: Full-text fetching. Hagbard Celine is the captain of the golden submarine in Illuminatus!

mindfuck.description: Bias mirror. Shows you your filter bubble and suggests articles that challenge your worldview.

immanentize_network.description: The keyword knowledge network. 'Immanentize the Eschaton' is a central motif in Illuminatus! - here all terms connect into a network.

fnord_stats.description: Overview of changed articles. Fnords are hidden words that cause fear - here we reveal changes in your articles.

erisian_archives.description: The archive of all articles. Eris is the goddess of discord - patron of Discordianism and namesake of this collection.

settings_view.description: Configure F.U.C.K.U.P. to your will. Even chaos sometimes needs order.

statusBar.hopelessTooltip: Articles whose AI analysis failed after multiple retries. These will no longer be analyzed automatically.
statusBar.failedTooltip: Articles where AI analysis failed, but more retries are pending.
statusBar.articlesTooltip: Total number of articles in the database

network.title: Immanentize Network
network.trendingTooltip: Keywords with the strongest growth in new articles over the last {days} days. Score = frequency × growth rate.
network.selectKeyword: Select a keyword from the list
network.categoriesHelp: Shows which topic areas this keyword appears in. The percentage indicates the relative strength of the association (based on article frequency).
network.selectKeywordForTrend: Select a keyword from the Keywords tab to see its trend
network.clickFindSynonyms: Click "Find Related" to load semantic suggestions
network.synonymCandidatesHint: These suggestions are based on embedding similarity (semantic proximity), not lexical matching. True synonyms (e.g., "EU" and "European Union") are detected separately.
network.trueSynonymsHint: These pairs are likely true synonyms (abbreviations, alternate names) based on string similarity.
network.manualMergeDescription: Select two keywords: The first one will be kept, the second will be deleted and all links will be transferred.
network.selectBothKeywords: Select both keywords to merge them.
network.sameKeywordError: The two keywords must be different.
network.noKeywordSelected: First select a keyword in the "Keywords" tab to merge it with other keywords.
network.name: Name
network.similarKeywordsHelp: Keywords with similar semantic meaning based on embeddings
network.detectTypesTitle: Detects keyword types for unclassified keywords
network.splitCompoundsDesc: Splits compound keywords like 'Ukraine-War' into their components.
network.synonymsHelp: Select semantically similar keywords to merge them. Similarity is based on embedding vectors, not lexical matching.

mindfuck.title: Operation Mindfuck
mindfuck.subtitle: Your Reading Behavior Mirrored
mindfuck.description: Discover your filter bubble and expand your horizons

profile.title: Reading Profile
profile.noData: No articles read yet. Start reading to build your profile.

blindSpots.title: Blind Spots
blindSpots.noBlindSpots: No blind spots detected - you're reading balanced!
blindSpots.noBlindSpotsSubtitle: Your reading habits cover all available categories well. Keep it up!

emptyState.title: Your Filter Bubble Busters
emptyState.description: This is where articles appear that challenge your usual perspectives and broaden your horizons.
emptyState.step1Description: We observe which topics and perspectives you prefer.
emptyState.step2Description: Blind spots and underrepresented viewpoints are identified.
emptyState.step3Description: Articles with different standpoints are specifically recommended.

placeholder.title: This is what recommendations look like

trends.title: Reading Trends
trends.noTrends: Not enough data for trends yet

erisianArchives.title: Erisian Archives
erisianArchives.subtitle: The Chaos Archive of All Articles
erisianArchives.noUnread: All articles have been read - Enlightenment achieved!
erisianArchives.noFavorites: No Golden Apples - mark articles as favorites!
erisianArchives.noHopeless: No hopeless cases - the AI has mastered everything!

empty.title: No recommendations yet
empty.description: We need more information about your interests to suggest relevant articles.
empty.reason_not_enough: You haven't read enough articles yet.
empty.reason_no_embeddings: Article embeddings are still being generated.
empty.reason_no_candidates: All available articles have already been read or hidden.

deletePentacle.title: Delete Source
deletePentacle.confirm: Do you really want to delete the source "{title}"?
deletePentacle.favoritesWarning: {count} of them is marked as favorite.
deletePentacle.favoritesWarningPlural: {count} of them are marked as favorites.

compound.title: Compound Keywords
compound.description: Manage compound keywords - split them into components or preserve them as-is.

briefing.title: Briefings
briefing.empty: No briefings yet. Create your first briefing!

themeReport.title: Theme Reports
themeReport.noResults: No themes found in the period. Try a longer time range.
themeReport.selectReport: Select a report from the list
